Iran's Revolutionary Guard announces that in the third phase of their retaliation operation after the new US strikes, they attacked targets at two American bases in Kuwait

US 🇺🇸 CENTCOM says it has completed another round of strikes against Iran 🇮🇷 to degrade its ability to continue attacking ships in the Strait of Hormuz. Tonight’s targets included Iranian military air-defense systems, coastal radar sites, missile and drone capabilities, and small boats. Strikes were carried out using US fighter aircraft, naval vessels, one-way attack aerial drones, and, for the first time, one-way attack sea drones.

Iran's Revolutionary Guard says in the second phase of their retaliation for the new US strikes they attacked a US base in Sheikh Isa, Bahrain, and "destroyed important helicopter maintenance and repair centers, a P-8 electronic warfare aircraft hangar, and the command and control center of the US military's drone fleet." (These claims are unverified.)
